Accepts donations of gently used clothing and toys. Clothing vouchers are available. 564 SW Foundry Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing Vouchers: Women and children Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 476-3344 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES OUR FOSTER KIDS SCHOOL SUPPLIES AND CHRISTMAS PRESENTS REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE
